summary: Representative #65184 is no longer an open canonical issue; it is now the closed canonical path for the migrated-root missing-unit subfamily and is marked fixed on `main` by the maintainer comment referencing commit `e4e69c5bc6`. The remaining open issues in this cluster (#39673, #44417, #63561) are still in the same gateway/systemd area but are not high-confidence duplicates of #65184, so they should stay open as related follow-up work. Linked PR #52293 is explicitly security-sensitive in the preflight artifact and is quarantined out of backlog cleanup.
